user_request: Emergency rite: relay station handoff requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: relay station handoff requires operation

### TOPIC
relay station handoff

### COMPONENT
relay station handoff

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- relay station handoff
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed be the relay station handoff, conduit of the Omnissiah's will.
First: Initiate the relay station handoff with sacred litanies of activation.
Second: Calibrate the relay station handoff through precise operation of all tertiary circuits.
Third: Invoke the Machine Spirit to guide the operation toward triumphant completion.
Fourth: Seal the relay station handoff in the Emperor's eternal grace.

prayer:

Second: Perform the balancing of the chemical with precision and reverence.
Third: Recalibrate the chemical's molecular harmonics through blessed operation.
Fourth: Seal the work in the name of the Machine God.

prayer:

Fourth: Reinforce the hull breach sealing with final benediction upon the hull breach.
